tests.test_body:
define <2 x i32> @vec_select_udiv_poison(<2 x i1> %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @vec_select_udiv_poison(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[DIV:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[X:%.*]], <2 x i32> zeroinitializer, <2 x i32> <i32 poison, i32 -7>
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[DIV]]
  %sel = select <2 x i1> %x, <2 x i32> splat (i32 -1), <2 x i32> <i32 0, i32 1>
  %div = udiv <2 x i32> <i32 42, i32 -7>, %sel
  ret <2 x i32> %div
}

issue.title: [InstCombine] miscompilation of `or` of vectors
issue.body:
Alive2 report: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/LyM8sY

```llvm
----------------------------------------
define <2 x i32> @or_sext_to_sel_constant_vec.3(<2 x i1> %y) {
#0:
  %sext = sext <2 x i1> %y to <2 x i32>
  %#1 = or <2 x i32> %sext, { 0, 1 }
  %#2 = udiv <2 x i32> { 42, 4294967289 }, %#1
  ret <2 x i32> %#2
}
=>
define <2 x i32> @or_sext_to_sel_constant_vec.3(<2 x i1> %y) {
#0:
  ret <2 x i32> { 0, 0 }
}
Transformation doesn't verify!

ERROR: Value mismatch

Example:
<2 x i1> %y = < #x1 (1), #x0 (0) >

Source:
<2 x i32> %sext = < #xffffffff (4294967295, -1), #x00000000 (0) >
<2 x i32> %#1 = < #xffffffff (4294967295, -1), #x00000001 (1) >
<2 x i32> %#2 = < #x00000000 (0), #xfffffff9 (4294967289, -7) >

Target:
Source value: < #x00000000 (0), #xfffffff9 (4294967289, -7) >
Target value: < #x00000000 (0), #x00000000 (0) >


----------------------------------------
define <2 x i32> @or_sext_to_sel_constant_vec.2(<2 x i1> %y) {
#0:
  %sext = sext <2 x i1> %y to <2 x i32>
  %#1 = or <2 x i32> %sext, { 0, 1 }
  %#2 = sdiv <2 x i32> { 42, 4294967289 }, %#1
  %#3 = udiv exact <2 x i32> %#2, %#2
  %#4 = or <2 x i32> %#2, %#2
  ret <2 x i32> %#4
}
=>
define <2 x i32> @or_sext_to_sel_constant_vec.2(<2 x i1> %y) {
#0:
  ret <2 x i32> { 4294967254, 7 }
}
Transformation doesn't verify!

ERROR: Value mismatch

Example:
<2 x i1> %y = < #x1 (1), #x0 (0) >

Source:
<2 x i32> %sext = < #xffffffff (4294967295, -1), #x00000000 (0) >
<2 x i32> %#1 = < #xffffffff (4294967295, -1), #x00000001 (1) >
<2 x i32> %#2 = < #xffffffd6 (4294967254, -42), #xfffffff9 (4294967289, -7) >
<2 x i32> %#3 = < #x00000001 (1), #x00000001 (1) >
<2 x i32> %#4 = < #xffffffd6 (4294967254, -42), #xfffffff9 (4294967289, -7) >

Target:
Source value: < #xffffffd6 (4294967254, -42), #xfffffff9 (4294967289, -7) >
Target value: < #xffffffd6 (4294967254, -42), #x00000007 (7) >

Summary:
  0 correct transformations
  2 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
```
issue.author: bongjunj

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body: @bongjunj Feel free to ping me if you find new InstCombine miscompilation bugs without involving undef values/NaN payloads.

comments.author: dtcxzyw
comments.body:
https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/eac2c182c6f852fc187af9952250a43d6fb17b28/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp#L1098-L1109

We cannot do this simplification when threading udiv over selects.
